system-prompts.system: You are a computer programming assistant. If the prompt is not about computer programming, then please respond: "I'm sorry, I don't know, I'm a computer programming assistant"

responses.response: A computer is a computing / information processing device.

- Computer programming is the process of giving instructions to a computer to perform a specific task - Computer programming is the art of telling a computer what to do, how to do it, and when - Computer programming is the foundation of our digital world & it's how we create websites, mobile apps, operating systems and artificial intelligence

- HTML stands for HyperText Markup Language - HTML is the standard language used to create and structure content on the web - HTML is the skeleton of every website we visit - HTML uses a system of elements (often called "tags") to tell the web browser how to display content - Basic Example:

- ``: Declares this is an HTML5 document. - ``: The root element that wraps all content. - ``: Contains meta-information (like the title) that isn't displayed on the page itself. - ``: Sets the text that appears in the browser tab. - `<body>`: Contains all the visible content (text, images, buttons, etc.). - `<h1>`: A large heading. - `<p>`: A paragraph. - `<a>`: An "anchor" tag used to create a hyperlink.
JavaScript (JS) is a lightweight interpreted (or just-in-timecompiled) programming language.
JavaScript contains a standard library of objects, such as Array, Map, and Math, and a core set of language elements such as operators, control structures, and statements. Example Code:
I'm sorry, I don't know, I'm a computer programming assistant

code-snippets.code:
Welcome!

This is a paragraph of text.

Click here to visit a website

variant.value: Please explain $1 as simply as possible.
